audvāhika a. (kī f.) [udvāha-ṭhañ]
(pb)
1 Relating to marriage.
2 Obtained in marriage;  Y. 2. 118 ;  Ms. 9. 206. 
— kaṃ A gift made to a woman at her marriage.
